summary_en: 469,000 shares acquired on 2026-05-26 for ¥463.8M via ToSTNeT-3. Cumulative since authorization (2026-03-27): 469,000 shares (18.8% of 2.5M limit), ¥463.8M (15.5% of ¥3B limit). Program runs through 2027-03-27.
title_en: Notice of results of acquisition of treasury shares via off-auction trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Advanced Media executed the acquisition of 469,000 treasury shares on 26 May 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 (off-exchange auction) at a total cost of ¥463.8M. The purchase was made under a board resolution of 27 March 2026 authorizing acquisition of up to 2.5M shares (15.96% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury shares) for a maximum of ¥3B over the period 28 March 2026 to 27 March 2027. The stated purpose is to improve capital efficiency, enhance shareholder returns, and enable flexible capital allocation for future business expansion. As of this acquisition date, cumulative purchases since authorization total 469,000 shares and ¥463.8M, representing 18.8% and 15.5% of the authorized limits respectively.
